text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Gate Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when ai-generated-iac-review-gate is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: AI-generated Terraform module leaks a default-region access key in a `default` variable.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add gitleaks / trufflehog step; block merge on findings.

antipattern.description: AI-generated IaC drifts state-file by reordering attributes; spurious diffs flood reviews.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add plan-diff step; ignore-by-default cosmetic changes; flag substantive ones.

antipattern.description: Reviewer merges high-blast change with 1 LGTM because everyone was busy.
antipattern.note: Fix: Make blast-radius classification mandatory + automated where possible.
